prefs.title: YAWF Preferences
prefs.heading: Preferences
prefs.ctrlEnter.label: Send with Ctrl+Enter
prefs.ctrlEnter.hint: Enter inserts a newline; Ctrl+Enter sends
prefs.idleReload.label: Idle heap reset (hours)
prefs.idleReload.hint: Reload WhatsApp Web after this long with no input. 0 disables it.
prefs.apiEnabled.label: Enable automation API
prefs.apiEnabled.hint: Manage keys, webhooks and activity from the tray's API Dashboard
prefs.apiPort.label: Automation API port
prefs.apiBridgeEnabled.label: Enable WhatsApp bridge (experimental)
prefs.apiBridgeEnabled.hint: Lets the API read session/QR status. Reloads WhatsApp Web when toggled.
phoneDialog.title: Open chat by phone number
phoneDialog.hint: Include the country code, no + or spaces (e.g. 15551234567)
shortcuts.title: YAWF Shortcuts
shortcuts.heading: Keyboard shortcuts
shortcuts.pasteImage: Force an image-only paste from the clipboard
shortcuts.screenshot: Capture a screen region into the composer
shortcuts.phoneDialog: Open a chat by phone number
resourceMonitor.title: YAWF Resource Monitor
resourceMonitor.heading: Process resource usage
apiDashboard.title: YAWF Automation API
apiDashboard.heading: Automation API
apiDashboard.enabled.label: Enable automation API
apiDashboard.status.failed: Enabled but not running - check the port is free
